tasks.subject: Task 0: Theme-Packs-With-Taste ‚Äî authored theme copy
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace all 11 `THEMES[*].label`/`description` strings in server/systems/themesSystem.js with an authored "movie-night program" voice; `id`/`match`/exports byte-identical (provably zero filter-behaviour change).

**Files:**
- Modify: server/systems/themesSystem.js (the 22 label/description literals + the block comment above THEMES only)
- Modify (append-only): server/systems/themesSystem.test.js (one new describe at EOF; existing 9 tests byte-identical)

**Verify:** `cd C:/mm-phase7-4 && npx jest server/systems/themesSystem.test.js` green (9 existing + 3 new); then full `npx jest` green.

**Steps:** TDD ‚Äî append a new describe pinning the exact authored label+description per id (via clientShape) + listThemes order + a behavioural re-affirmation ‚Üí verify the new describe FAILS while the existing 9 PASS ‚Üí re-voice the 11 label/description pairs (exact table in plan; emoji retained; typographic ‚Äô in decade names; nothing below `};` or the GENRE_ consts touched) + WHY comment (7.4 re-voice, ids/match deliberately untouched, 6c-dedup presentation-only) ‚Üí verify all green ‚Üí full suite ‚Üí branch-verify == phase7-4-quick-win-identity ‚Üí commit.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Panic Mode Timer ‚Äî pure timerSeverity + strict-subset timer-panic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Physical last-5s timer state via a pure `timerSeverity()` and an additive `timer-panic` class that is a STRICT SUBSET of the existing `timer-critical` (never set unless critical is; never outlives it). Existing colour/width/sfx untouched.

**Files:**
- Create: public/js/ui/timer-panic.js (pure, zero imports)
- Modify: public/js/ui.js (barrel +1 line after name-prompts.js)
- Modify: public/js/socketClient.js (add `timerSeverity` to the lines 11-23 `./ui.js` import; 3 additive class-toggle lines in the timer interval ~360-413)
- Modify: public/css/06-states-anim.css (additive #timer-bar.timer-panic + @keyframes timerPanic immediately after the .timer-critical rule at :795-797)
- Create: client-tests/timer-panic.test.js

**Verify:** `cd C:/mm-phase7-4 && npx jest client-tests/timer-panic.test.js` green; then full `npx jest` green.

**Steps:** TDD ‚Äî write timer-panic.test.js (panic ‚â§5, critical 5<x‚â§10, normal >10, negative‚Üípanic clamp 0, NaN/undefined/null/Infinity/string‚Üínormal) ‚Üí verify FAIL (no module) ‚Üí create timer-panic.js (Number.isFinite guard, neg‚Üí0, exact bands) + barrel export + add `timerSeverity` to socketClient `./ui.js` import + 3 additive edits (guard: remove timer-panic beside timer-critical; tr<=10 block: classList.toggle('timer-panic', timerSeverity(tr)==='panic'); else: remove timer-panic) + additive CSS (transform scaleY + box-shadow only, NO width; static box-shadow on base rule = legible under existing global prefers-reduced-motion; no background so composes over .speed-mode !important) + WHY comments ‚Üí verify PASS ‚Üí full suite ‚Üí branch-verify ‚Üí commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/timer-panic.js", "public/js/ui.js", "public/js/socketClient.js", "public/css/06-states-anim.css", "client-tests/timer-panic.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-4 && npx jest client-tests/timer-panic.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["timerSeverity: <=5 panic, 5<x<=10 critical, >10 normal; negative‚Üípanic(clamp 0); NaN/undefined/null/Infinity/'5'‚Üínormal", "timer-panic added iff timerSeverity(tr)==='panic' inside the existing tr<=10 branch via classList.toggle", "timer-panic removed in BOTH places timer-critical is removed (else branch + interval-clear guard) ‚Äî never outlives critical", "no change to width math / severity colours / tick sfx gate / timer-critical behaviour (3 additive lines + 1 import symbol)", "06-states-anim.css additive #timer-bar.timer-panic + @keyframes timerPanic after :797; transform/box-shadow only, NO width; static box-shadow keeps legible under existing global prefers-reduced-motion; no background ‚Üí composes over .speed-mode !important", "barrel re-exports timer-panic.js", "WHY comments on every change", "full npx jest suite green, additive"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Daily ritual ‚Äî reset countdown + device-local streak
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append a live UTC-midnight reset countdown + a device-local streak to the daily result modal via pure functions + thin glue; zero edits to existing nodes; a self-clearing interval that cannot leak across any close path.

**Files:**
- Create: public/js/ui/daily-ritual.js (pure formatResetCountdown + computeDailyStreak + defensive readDailyStreak/writeDailyStreak; zero imports)
- Modify: public/js/ui.js (barrel +1 line after the Task-1 timer-panic line)
- Modify: public/js/ui/ui-panels.js (direct-sibling import; module-scoped `let _dailyCountdownTimer`; top-of-render hard-clear; append .daily-ritual block before modal.classList.remove('hidden'))
- Modify: public/css/06-states-anim.css (additive .daily-ritual/.daily-streak/.daily-countdown between .daily-lb-len:~249 and the H5 MY STATS comment)
- Create: client-tests/daily-ritual.test.js

**Verify:** `cd C:/mm-phase7-4 && npx jest client-tests/daily-ritual.test.js` green; then full `npx jest` green (daily-name-prompt + all others still green).

**Steps:** TDD ‚Äî write daily-ritual.test.js (formatResetCountdown injected-now cases incl. exact-midnight=23h 59m & never-negative; computeDailyStreak first/same-idempotent/+1/gap/corrupt/non-integer; read/write defensive incl. malformed JSON; jsdom renderDailyResult appends .daily-ritual as last body child, existing .daily-score-num/.daily-lb-name intact, no stableId in modal HTML, alreadyPlayed path + idempotent re-open = 1 block) ‚Üí verify FAIL (no module) ‚Üí create daily-ritual.js (Date.UTC next-midnight; _validPrev shape guard; STREAK_KEY 'mm:dailyStreak'; try/catch read+write) + barrel export + ui-panels.js direct import + module-scoped id + top-of-render clearInterval + appended additive block (readDailyStreak‚ÜícomputeDailyStreak‚ÜíwriteDailyStreak; streak+countdown els) + self-clearing 60000ms interval (clears when modal.classList.contains('hidden')) + additive CSS + WHY comments ‚Üí verify PASS ‚Üí full suite ‚Üí branch-verify ‚Üí commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/daily-ritual.js", "public/js/ui.js", "public/js/ui/ui-panels.js", "public/css/06-states-anim.css", "client-tests/daily-ritual.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-4 && npx jest client-tests/daily-ritual.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["formatResetCountdown: ms to next UTC 00:00:00 ‚Üí 'Xh Ym' (‚â•1h) / 'Ym' (<1h‚â•1m) / '<1m'; never negative; never a day component; exact-midnight‚Üí'23h 59m'", "computeDailyStreak: ==prev‚Üíunchanged(idempotent), ==prev+1‚Üíincrement, else/missing/corrupt/non-integer‚Üí1; returns {streak,next:{lastPuzzleNumber,streak}}", "readDailyStreak/writeDailyStreak: key mm:dailyStreak; any throw/malformed/wrong-shape‚Üínull; write swallows errors", "renderDailyResult appends one .daily-ritual block as LAST child of #daily-result-body; existing title/subtitle/score/replay/leaderboard nodes unmodified; no stableId rendered", "‚â§1 live interval ever: module-scoped id hard-cleared at top of render + interval self-clears when modal hidden (covers Done btn, ‚úï global handler, programmatic .hidden)", "barrel re-exports daily-ritual.js; ui-panels.js uses a direct sibling import (no barrel cycle, 7.3 DAG discipline)", "additive CSS after the daily-lb block; no existing rule edited", "WHY comments on every change", "full npx jest suite green, daily-name-prompt + all others still green"]}
```
